content.content:
1	// API Response
2	export interface ApiResponse<T> {
3	  code: number
4	  message: string
5	  data: T
6	}
7	
8	export interface PageResult<T> {
9	  records: T[]
10	  total: number
11	  page: number
12	  size: number
13	}
14	
15	// Auth
16	export interface LoginForm {
17	  username: string
18	  password: string
19	}
20	
21	export interface RegisterForm {
22	  username: string
23	  password: string
24	  email: string
25	}
26	
27	export interface UserInfo {
28	  id: number
29	  username: string
30	  email: string
31	  avatar: string
32	  level: string
33	  createdAt: string
34	}
35	
36	export interface TokenInfo {
37	  token: string
38	  user: UserInfo
39	}
40	
41	// Chat
42	export interface Conversation {
43	  id: number
44	  title: string
45	  createdAt: string
46	  updatedAt: string
47	}
48	
49	export interface Message {
50	  id: number
51	  conversationId: number
52	  role: 'user' | 'assistant'
53	  content: string
54	  sources: string[]
55	  createdAt: string
56	}
57	
58	// Graph
59	export interface KnowledgeNode {
60	  id: string
61	  name: string
62	  category: string
63	  description: string
64	  difficulty: string
65	  keywords: string[]
66	}
67	
68	export interface GraphEdge {
69	  source: string
70	  target: string
71	  type: string
72	}
73	
74	export interface GraphData {
75	  nodes: KnowledgeNode[]
76	  edges: GraphEdge[]
77	}
78	
79	// Learning Path
80	export interface LearningPath {
81	  id: number
82	  target: string
83	  status: string
84	  nodes: LearningNodeInfo[]
85	  createdAt: string
86	}
87	
88	export interface LearningNodeInfo {
89	  id: number
90	  knowledgeId: string
91	  knowledgeName: string
92	  nodeOrder: number
93	  status: 'todo' | 'doing' | 'done' | 'skipped'
94	  resourceUrls: string[]
95	}
96	
97	// Snippets
98	export interface CodeSnippet {
99	  id: number
100	  title: string
101	  code: string
102	  language: string
103	  description: string
104	  tags: string[]
105	  useCount: number
106	  createdAt: string
107	  updatedAt: string
108	}
109	
110	// Progress
111	export interface DashboardData {
112	  totalDays: number
113	  totalChats: number
114	  totalSnippets: number
115	  knowledgeCoverage: number
116	  recentActivity: { date: string; count: number }[]
117	}
118	
119	export interface HeatmapData {
120	  year: number
121	  data: { date: string; count: number }[]
122	}
123	
124	export interface RadarData {
125	  categories: string[]
126	  values: number[]
127	}
128	
129	export interface WeakArea {
130	  key: string
131	  name: string
132	  score: number
133	  suggestion: string
134	}
135	
136	export interface WeeklyPlanItem {
137	  id: string
138	  title: string
139	  description: string
140	  completed: boolean
141	}
142	
143	export interface SmartInsights {
144	  healthScore: number
145	  weakAreas: WeakArea[]
146	  weeklyPlan: WeeklyPlanItem[]
147	}
148
